The '''''Ammuud Swooper''''' was a skyblue light [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] which helped at the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]] to evacuate the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was heavily damaged and was repaired in the jungle of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], while the Battle was going on. They could only escape with the help of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], who was the last to leave the base. He defended the ''Ammuud Swooper'' with the heavily damaged [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] ''Blackmoon'' 11, which was the only possibilty to escape. He defended the ''Ammuud Swooper'' against two [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] squadrons until [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and the rest of [[Blackmoon Squadron]] arrived.

{{Ship-stub}}
